bugs.report_text: The main container layout is stacking elements vertically instead of displaying them side-by-side, causing the interface to collapse into a linear arrangement.
The chat window appears hidden or stuck behind other interface elements, rendering it completely inaccessible to user interactions.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-white shadow-xl relative z-0 overlfow-hidden">

bugs.report_text: Content inside the container is not properly constrained and scrolls horizontally beyond its intended boundaries.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-white shadow-xl relative z-0 overlfow-hidden">

bugs.report_text: The header bar is rendered behind the messages panel, making it invisible and unreachable for user interaction.
bugs.neg_code: <header className="h-16 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between px-6 flex-shrink-0 z-10">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="h-16 px-6 flex items-center justify-between bg-white border-b border-gray-200 shadow-sm -z-10 relative">

bugs.report_text: The contact name text is invisible or blends seamlessly into the header background, making it completely unreadable.
The sidebar is excessively wide, consuming too much horizontal screen space and leaving insufficient room for the message area.
bugs.neg_code: <aside className="w-64 bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="w-80 bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex flex-col h-full z-20 relative">

bugs.report_text: The search bar and input elements have no spacing around them, causing text and UI components to collide directly with the section borders.
The contact list is shifted abnormally upward, causing contact entries to overlap with the header section and creating visual clutter.
Messages are arranged in a multi-column grid layout instead of a linear sequence, disrupting the natural conversational flow.
The message bubbles display with an incorrect color scheme, using a bright yellow tone instead of the intended dark blue, creating visual inconsistency.
bugs.neg_code: const bgColor = isOwn ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white' : 'bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-800';
